scripts.tunnel: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$CF_TUNNEL_ID" ]; then cloudflared tunnel --url http://localhost:3000 run "$CF_TUNNEL_ID"; fi
scripts.push: bun push:auth && bun push:paykit:polar && bun push:paykit:stripe && bun push:autumn
scripts.push:paykit:polar: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$POLAR_DATABASE_URL" ] && [ -n "$POLAR_ACCESS_TOKEN" ] && [ -n "$POLAR_WEBHOOK_SECRET" ]; then bunx paykitjs push --config paykit.polar.config.ts --yes; else printf '%s\n' 'Skipping PayKit Polar push: provider env incomplete'; fi
scripts.push:paykit:stripe: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$STRIPE_DATABASE_URL" ] && [ -n "$STRIPE_SECRET_KEY" ] && [ -n "$STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET" ]; then bunx paykitjs push --config paykit.stripe.config.ts --yes; else printf '%s\n' 'Skipping PayKit Stripe push: provider env incomplete'; fi
scripts.push:autumn: set -a; [ -f .env ] && . ./.env; set +a; if [ -n "$AUTUMN_SECRET_KEY" ]; then atmn push; else printf '%s\n' 'Skipping Autumn push: provider env incomplete'; fi
